name: door-opens-rei
prompt: Medium shot from inside dim room. Door opening, light flooding in. Silver-haired woman silhouetted in doorway, glancing back over shoulder first — checking no one saw her come here. FORBIDDEN FRAMING. Needing escape to private space. Industrial shelving visible on walls. Dust in light shafts. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

sfx.description: heavy metal door creaking open, light flooding in

name: rei-pov-kade
prompt: POV shot into dim storage room. Dark-haired young man leaning against back wall, amber eyes opening slowly, heat-shimmer visible in the air around him. Industrial shelving, concrete walls. Light from doorway behind camera. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: kade-occupied
prompt: Medium close-up. Dark-haired young man, amber eyes opening slowly, finding camera. Lazy confident expression. Disheveled uniform, burn scars on visible hand. Heat shimmer around him. Dim ambient lighting, warm glow. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style
